outcome.address_model_failure: llvm-mos uintptr_t is 16-bit; converting physical Bank-5 address 0x00050000 to uintptr_t truncated it to 0x0000
outcome.rollback: all probe product, stager, ABI, error-table, and runtime-overlay source changes removed

c2_note: Bank 5 is session-mutated before C2, so restart requires a pristine whole-image restore. The bounded pre-C2 resident implementation exceeded Bank 0 before it could link; C2's immutable-code/mutable-session split must reduce the restore surface rather than preserve this mechanism.
claim_limit: Diagnosis only: no product candidate linked, no hardware smoke ran, no capacity debit is authorized, and no restart-repl device semantics are claimed.
